Strategic Partnership Between Doğuş University and Bilişim Vadisi

A Strategic Cooperation Protocol, which aims to strengthen the collaboration between academia and the technology ecosystem, has been signed between Doğuş University and Bilişim Vadisi Teknopark Yönetici A.Ş.

Within the scope of the said protocol, the objectives are to:

* Develop the cooperation activities to be carried out between our university and the companies operating within Bilişim Vadisi and the Bilişim Vadisi Technology Development Zone (TGB).

* Strengthen the communication and coordination between the parties.

With this collaboration, it is aimed to bring academic knowledge together with the technology ecosystem and to increase the interaction between the university and the sector.
